{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Thousand Beast Forest
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Thousand Beast Forest]] is a place where two-headed bears live.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
